title: AwardsWatch - FINAL 2026 Oscar Predictions: FILM EDITING and CINEMATOGRAPHY
text: Erik Anderson's final predictions for the 2026 Academy Awards top contenders in Film Editing: One Battle After Another (Andy Jurgensen) from Warner Bros; Sinners (Michael P. Shawver) from Warner Bros; F1 (Stephen Mirrione) from Apple Original Films/Warner Bros; Marty Supreme (Ronald Bronstein) from A24; and Hamnet (Chloé Zhao and Affonso Gonçalves) from Focus Features. Anderson notes that the first four films represent locked in frontrunners with strong support from industry guilds. He describes the fifth position as uncertain, stating it will be a fight between Hamnet and other contenders like Frankenstein and A House of Dynamite. The predictions emphasize that films securing Critics Choice Association nominations and BAFTA longlist positions demonstrate particular strength in this category.
